_why: Registry of all Open WebUI Python filters for AI-OS. Defines installation order, dependencies, valve defaults, and enable/disable policy. Source of truth for the filter chain.

filter_chain.name: AI-OS RPM Guard
filter_chain._why: First in chain. Prevents NIM 429 errors from corrupting active streaming sessions.

filter_chain.name: AI-OS Credential Scrub
filter_chain._why: Second in chain. Redacts credentials before any external API call. Irreversible exposure prevention.

filter_chain.name: AI-OS Profile Selector
filter_chain._why: Classifies task and applies optimal parameters before NIM. Sets _ai_os_task_class for downstream filters.

filter_chain.name: AI-OS Context Budget Enforcer
filter_chain._why: Prevents context overflow on NIM Free Tier. Truncates oldest history first, preserving system prompt and recent turns.

filter_chain.name: AI-OS Response Quality Monitor
filter_chain._why: Outlet only. Measures quality signals for benchmark harness. Does not modify response.

append_quality_metadata.description: Set true for benchmark debug runs only

installation_notes: Each filter must be assigned to the 'AI-OS · Nemotron Ultra' model specifically
Do not assign filters globally — they contain NIM-specific logic
After installation, run benchmark/harness.py to verify filter chain is functioning
